text:
Program:AM

Presented by

Golden Girl Ariarne Titmus has broken the 200m freestyle world record at the Australian Olympic trials in Brisbane.

She's heading to Paris, alongside former record holder Molly O'Callaghan.

Some swimmers have qualified for their fourth Games, while others are about to make their Olympic debut.

((AP: Charlie Riedel))

title: Record falls in Olympic swimming trials - ABC listen
description: Golden Girl Ariarne Titmus has broken the 200m freestyle world record at the Australian Olympic trials in Brisbane.
